title: two-trait split: doc which trait to implement for each use case
description: TransportConfig and AuthProvider trait docs explain what each trait does but not which one a contributor should implement in common scenarios. A contributor writing a custom auth scheme must read JmapChatClient::new and both trait definitions before understanding the rule: implement TransportConfig for custom TLS/trust-root logic; implement AuthProvider for custom header injection; implement both only if the same type needs to control both. The trait-level docs should each include a one-sentence decision guide so contributors do not have to read the constructor to figure out the right trait.
close_reason: Added decision guide to TransportConfig and AuthProvider trait docs in auth.rs
